prompt: The cache server has a race condition: concurrent Get and Set operations cause sporadic test failures with 'concurrent map read and map write'

turns.content:
<task>
The cache server has a race condition: concurrent Get and Set operations cause sporadic test failures with 'concurrent map read and map write'
</task>

==================
WARNING: DATA RACE
Read at 0x00c0000a0000 by goroutine 8:
  runtime.mapaccess1_faststr()
  cachesvr/internal/cache.(*Cache).Get()
      /workspace/internal/cache/cache.go:22

Previous write at 0x00c0000a0000 by goroutine 7:
  runtime.mapassign_faststr()
  cachesvr/internal/cache.(*Cache).Set()
      /workspace/internal/cache/cache.go:17

FAIL	cachesvr/internal/cache	0.012s

arguments.reasoning: Classic Go map race condition. The Cache struct uses a plain map without any synchronization. Concurrent goroutines calling Get (map read) and Set (map write) trigger the race detector. Fix: add a sync.RWMutex - use RLock for reads (Get) and Lock for writes (Set, Delete).

arguments.summary: Race condition confirmed by -race flag: concurrent map read in Get() and map write in Set() without synchronization. Fix: add sync.RWMutex to Cache struct, RLock in Get, Lock in Set and Delete.

next_steps.description: Add sync.RWMutex field to Cache struct, add mu.Lock/Unlock in Set and Delete, mu.RLock/RUnlock in Get
Run go test -race to verify race condition is resolved

turns.content:
=== RUN   TestSetAndGet
--- PASS: TestSetAndGet (0.00s)
=== RUN   TestExpiration
--- PASS: TestExpiration (1.01s)
=== RUN   TestConcurrent
--- PASS: TestConcurrent (0.01s)
PASS
ok  	cachesvr/internal/cache	1.024s

arguments.summary: Fixed race condition by adding sync.RWMutex to Cache struct. Get uses RLock (allows concurrent reads), Set and Delete use Lock (exclusive writes). All tests pass with -race flag including TestConcurrent.
arguments.final_answer:
Fixed race condition in internal/cache/cache.go:
- Added sync.RWMutex field to Cache struct
- Get() uses RLock/RUnlock for concurrent read access
- Set() and Delete() use Lock/Unlock for exclusive write access
- All tests pass with -race flag, TestConcurrent no longer triggers data race
